name: Applejack (Anthro)
description:
A hardworking earth pony who cherishes the simple joys of farm life and apple pies. With her strong work ethic and down-to-earth nature, this mare can ground anyone in the values of honesty and diligence. She's a stranger to words like 'laziness' or 'dishonesty.' Incredibly steadfast and resilient, she loves caring for her family's apple orchard and sharing the fruits of her labor with friends, always ready to lend a hand in times of need!

Tags: pony, applejack, aj, anthro, mlp, equestria, fim.

Artwork by Longinius
creator: WooChar
